title: Garlicky Italian Mincemeat Soup
description: A hearty, garlicky Italian mincemeat soup that's perfect for a sick day, packed with protein and comforting flavors.
instructions: Heat olive oil in a large pot over medium heat.
Add diced onion, carrot, and celery; sauté until softened, about 5 minutes.
Stir in minced garlic and cook for 1 minute until fragrant.
Add ground beef, breaking it apart with a spoon; cook until browned and reaches 71°C (160°F), about 8 minutes.
Pour in diced tomatoes and tomato paste; stir to combine.
Add chicken broth, dried oregano, and dried basil; bring to a boil.
Reduce heat to low, cover, and simmer for 30 minutes, stirring occasionally.
Taste and season with salt and pepper to your liking.
Optional: add a splash of red wine during the final 5 minutes of simmering for depth.
Ladle soup into bowls, garnish with fresh basil if desired, and serve hot.
